location.office_time_required: some in-person meetings; flexibility to work from home

level_signals: Principal title with mentoring and cross-team influence responsibilities
Comp range $182K–$260K base consistent with Principal-level IC at a large tech company

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 10+ years of product management experience working on consumer-facing products
You have experience owning or influencing large product areas that span multiple teams or surfaces
You have a deep understanding of discovery, search, or personalization systems
You know how to turn complex systems into simple, intuitive user experiences
You are comfortable leading through influence in highly cross-functional environments
You care deeply about product craft and building high-quality user experiences at scale
You use data, experimentation, and judgment to guide decisions and strategy
You are a strong collaborator who builds alignment across engineering, design, and data partners

scope.surface: Consumer discovery experience — Home, Browse, Search; spans mobile, desktop, smart speakers, TVs, cars, and partner integrations
primary_metrics_inferred: Discovery engagement and conversion (plays initiated from discovery surfaces)
Experiment win rate on discovery surfaces
core_responsibilities: Define and drive the long-term product vision for how users explore and decide what to play on Spotify
Shape discovery experiences across key consumer surfaces such as Home, Browse, and Search
Lead cross-surface strategy that connects personalized recommendations, editorial context, and user intent into a cohesive journey
Partner with engineering, design, and data science to evolve scalable discovery platforms and components used across Spotify
Identify opportunities to reduce decision friction and make exploration feel effortless and engaging
Influence roadmap and priorities across multiple teams, ensuring alignment with broader consumer experience strategy
Use experimentation, behavioral data, & user insights to inform strategy & continuously improve outcomes
Act as a senior product leader, mentoring others and raising the bar for product thinking, clarity, and impact

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly stated ($182K–$260K base) plus equity
Benefits clearly enumerated including 6-month paid parental leave and 23 paid days off
Clear product surface ownership (Home, Browse, Search) — not vague
Hybrid flexibility acknowledged with work-from-home option
High-visibility role at a globally recognized consumer brand
red_flags: No visa sponsorship or work authorization information provided — unclear for non-US candidates
Wide comp range ($78K spread) may indicate significant leveling ambiguity
No nice-to-haves listed — JD is sparse and may under-specify what differentiates candidates
Role requires NYC base; no other locations mentioned

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Principal', 10+ years requirement, and comp range)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (not stated in JD; inferred from responsibilities)
location.type (body says 'some in-person meetings' and 'flexibility to work from home'; treated as hybrid)
ambiguities: No explicit visa sponsorship or work authorization statement — left as 'unclear'
Nice-to-haves section is entirely absent; all 'Who You Are' bullets read as required — treated as must_haves with hard severity
Hybrid vs. onsite: JD says 'based in New York, NY' and 'some in person meetings' with 'flexibility to work from home' — treated as hybrid with NYC base required
